subject: URGENT: Assignment Deadline Extended to Tonight
body: Dear students, the deadline for the Neural Networks assignment has been extended to 11:59 PM tonight. Please submit your work on the portal. Late submissions will not be accepted.

subject: CRITICAL: Production Server Down
body: The main production server is experiencing downtime. All engineers please join the war room immediately. This is affecting customer-facing services.

subject: Team Lunch This Friday
body: Hey! We're planning a team lunch this Friday at that new Italian restaurant. Let me know if you can make it. Thinking around 1 PM.

subject: Code Review: PR #234 - Neural Model Updates
body: Hi, I've made some updates to the neural network training pipeline. Could you review the changes when you get a chance? No rush, but before end of week would be great.

subject: Your Weekly Tech Digest
body: This week in tech: AI models are getting smaller and faster, new breakthroughs in edge computing, and the rise of personal AI assistants. Read more in our curated selection of articles.

subject: You've WON a FREE iPhone 16!!!
body: CONGRATULATIONS! You have been selected as the winner of our grand prize draw. Click the link below to claim your brand new iPhone 16 Pro Max. ACT NOW before the offer expires!!!

subject: Monthly Performance Review
body: Hi, your monthly performance review is scheduled for next Tuesday at 3 PM. Please prepare a brief summary of your accomplishments and goals for the discussion.

subject: Internship Opportunity at Google
body: We reviewed your profile and would like to invite you to apply for our Summer 2026 internship program. The role focuses on machine learning infrastructure. Application deadline is May 30th.

subject: Auto-reply: Out of Office
body: I am currently out of office until May 20th with limited access to email. For urgent matters, please contact the team lead at teamlead@company.com.

subject: Lab Session Cancelled Tomorrow
body: The practical lab session scheduled for tomorrow at 2 PM has been cancelled due to maintenance work in the lab. It will be rescheduled to next week.

subject: ACTION REQUIRED: Visa Application Documents
body: Please submit your visa application documents by end of day Friday. Missing this deadline will delay your application by several weeks. Required documents: passport copy, bank statement, enrollment certificate.

subject: Project Milestone Update - Week 5
body: Hi team, here's our weekly update. We're on track for the Phase 2 milestone. The intent classifier is showing 98% accuracy. Response generator training starts next week.

subject: DOUBLE Your Bitcoin in 24 Hours!!!
body: Our revolutionary AI trading bot has helped thousands make millions. Sign up today with just $100 and watch your investment grow. 100% guaranteed returns or your money back!

subject: Invitation: AI Workshop Next Saturday
body: You're invited to our hands-on AI workshop covering TensorFlow, Keras, and building neural networks from scratch. Free for members, Rs. 200 for non-members. Register by Wednesday.

subject: Shared Document: Budget Proposal Q3
body: I've shared the Q3 budget proposal document with you. Please review the neural desk project allocation and provide your feedback by Thursday.
